prompts.name: FizzBuzz Implementation
prompts.input_text: Write a Python function called fizzbuzz that takes an integer n and returns a list of strings from 1 to n. For multiples of 3, use 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 use 'Buzz', and for multiples of both use 'FizzBuzz'. Otherwise use the string representation of the number.
prompts.expected_output: A Python function that correctly implements the FizzBuzz logic

prompts.name: Binary Search
prompts.input_text: Implement a binary search function in Python that takes a sorted list and a target value. Return the index if found, or -1 if not found. Include proper handling of edge cases.
prompts.expected_output: A correct binary search implementation with O(log n) time complexity

prompts.name: LRU Cache
prompts.input_text: Design and implement an LRU (Least Recently Used) cache in Python. It should support get(key) and put(key, value) operations, both in O(1) time complexity. The cache should have a configurable maximum capacity.
prompts.expected_output: An LRU cache implementation using OrderedDict or a combination of dict and doubly linked list
